message.content:
@startuml
title GameEnginePluginLifecycle

participant "Host Application" as HA
participant "Host Application Interop" as HAI
participant "Game Engine Plugin" as GEP

HA -- Initialization : new
HA -- new : HAI

HAI -- Load GE Plugin(s) : Load GE Plugin(s)

HAI -- load into memory : Game Engine Plugin

HAI -- GEP_Initialize : GEP_Initialize
GEP -- initialization_ok = 0 : HAI

loop [Repeat Every Frame Period]
    HAI -- GEP_HandleSimulationReponseMessages : GEP_HandleSimulationReponseMessages
    GEP -- handled_ok = 0 : HAI

    delays

    HAI -- GEP_HandleSimulationControlMessages : GEP_HandleSimulationControlMessages
    GEP -- handled_ok = 0 : HAI
endloop

@enduml
